pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 8 code, failing to utilize Java 11 features or comply with the migration target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 11 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo (like 0.7.5) do not support Java 11 class files, causing runtime errors or coverage failures during test execution on JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the javax.inject module from the JDK; applications relying on it must explicitly depend on the Jakarta EE replacement to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the javax.annotation module from the JDK; applications relying on it must explicitly depend on the Jakarta EE replacement to compile.
